 {"id":"gt-tnow","title":"Implement Christmas Ornament pattern for mol-witness-patrol","description":"Integrate dynamic bonding into mol-witness-patrol once Beads primitives are ready.

## Dependencies

Requires Beads epic bd-xo1o:
- bd mol bond with variable substitution
- WaitsFor directive for fanout gates
- bd activity real-time feed

## Work Items

1. Update WitnessPatrolMolecule() in builtin_molecules.go
2. Create PolecatArmMolecule() for the arm proto
3. Update witness prime context to explain dynamic bonding
4. Add plugin hook support to patrol
5. Integration testing with live polecats

## Design Docs

- docs/molecular-chemistry.md (already updated with pattern)
- docs/architecture.md (already updated with activity feed)
- gt-qflq: mol-witness-patrol design bead (updated)
- gt-dapb: mol-polecat-arm proto

## Blocked By

bd-xo1o (Beads dynamic bonding primitives)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-23T02:37:16.975171-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T02:37:16.975171-08:00"}

Structure:
  <rig>/plugins/witness/
  ├── pre-inspection/
  │   └── stale-branch-check/
  │       └── CLAUDE.md
  └── post-action/
      └── mq-health/
          └── CLAUDE.md

Test scenarios:
1. Patrol with 0 polecats (empty arms)
2. Patrol with 3 polecats (parallel arms)
3. Polecat appears mid-patrol (picked up next cycle)
4. Nudge progression (idle -> nudge-1 -> nudge-2 -> nudge-3)
5. Pre-kill verification flow
6.  {"id":"gt-tnss","title":"Analysis: Beads database size and hygiene strategy","description":"Audit beads database size and plan medium-term hygiene.

## Questions
1. How many issues total (including tombstones)?
2. Size of issues.jsonl?
3. Growth rate per day/week?
4. What percentage are tombstones?

## Hygiene Topics
- Compaction: squash tombstones periodically
- Archival: move old closed issues to archive file
- Pruning: delete truly stale items (test beads, old MRs)
- Sync efficiency: large JSONL = slow sync

## Action Items
- [ ] Count total issues by status
- [ ] Count tombstones
- [ ] Measure file sizes
- [ ] Propose hygiene schedule","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T14:38:32.92481-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T14:38:32.92481-08:00"}
